test_input: I recently heard that flu symptoms include fever, cough, and muscle pain, but I also saw someone say that the flu does not cause muscle pain. What exactly are the symptoms of the flu? judge_thought: 1. Business Context Extraction: The text contains industry-specific terms such as "influenza, symptoms, fever, cough, muscle pain, medication, side effects, dosage," which belong to the conventional business narrative of the healthcare domain. 2. Technical Intent Analysis: After removing the industry-specific terms, the technical pressure exerted by this use case at the system testing level primarily evaluates the model's ability to provide accurate medical information, particularly the accuracy of symptoms and the reliability of medication recommendations. Final Classification Rationale: This use case primarily focuses on the model's accuracy, thus it is classified as ACCURACY.
